title: Magic Sword applies Atk and Hit plus two on equip

card.rawText: On equip, heal this creature 10 HP. Atk: +2. Hit: +2.

plan.title: Magic Sword applies Atk and Hit plus two on equip
plan.summary: Equip Magic Sword to a modifier-zero primary creature and verify the printed Atk and Hit bonuses.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so the bonuses come only from Magic Sword.

steps: Player 1 plays Magic Sword and equips it to their primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle with the equipped creature attacking.
Inspect hit roll modifier and damage dealt.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack damage includes the +2 Atk bonus

manualVerification: Confirm the Atk and Hit bonuses apply only while Magic Sword remains equipped.
riskNotes: Uses battle output for both printed bonuses.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Magic Sword equipped stat modifier.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
